calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Determining Asset To Be Trust Asset And For Authority To Transfer Asset To The Trustee Of The Anna Romero Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Jul-24-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman appeared by zoom for and with Angelina Romero (trustee) by zoom.

The court stated that it appreciates the efforts made to straighten things out and that it does not think it can put its stamp on a corrected deed, but that it can approve the petition but only as to the decedent's interest in the real property. The Petition for Order Determining Asset and for Authority to Transfer Asset to the Trustee is under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Cristobal. Not reported.

Petition For Order Determining Asset To Be Trust Asset And For Authority To Transfer Asset To The Trustee Of The Anna Romero Revocable Living Trust
Off Calendar Aug-23-2023 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Edward Broitman appeared via zoom for and with Angelina Romero (trustee).

Discussion held in regard to the real property and how the title was held, that the property has been referred to the property located on 17th street, and that an affidavit of death needs to be filed for Mr. Romero. Petition for order determining asset etc., is taken under submission.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
